india.title: Why Valkyrae believes Nina Lin should never return to Twitch after recent controversies
india.summary: Popular YouTuber Valkyrae has voiced strong disapproval over streamer Nina Lin's return to Twitch, citing a pattern of serious controversies. Valkyrae highlighted past allegations involving creators DisguisedToast and Said, alongside Nina's recent arrest in New York for disorderly conduct. She argued these repeated incidents warrant a permanent ban, not a short suspension, questioning Twitch's consistency in enforcing its rules for creators facing multiple serious accusations.

xQc survives scary Lamborghini scare after losing control during live track session
india.summary: Popular streamer xQc narrowly avoided a serious crash while live-streaming from a Canadian racetrack. His high-performance Lamborghini Huracán Tecnica slid dangerously close to a trackside structure after hitting a curb. Thanks to xQc's quick reflexes and the instructor's intervention, the supercar was brought back under control, preventing a potential accident. The incident, captured on camera, highlighted the thrilling yet perilous nature of track driving.

This alleged theft has ended their decades-long friendship, with Greg yet to respond to the accusations.

business.title: US Stocks: Oppenheimer makes rare cuts to top US investment banks, backs alternative asset managers
business.summary: Oppenheimer has downgraded major U.S. investment banks like Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, citing limited upside despite a positive environment. The brokerage advises selling these large-cap banks and instead investing in alternative asset managers, whose shares have seen a significant sell-off. Oppenheimer believes investment banks are in the late stages of an expansionary cycle and suggests reallocating funds to commercial banks and alternative managers like Ares Management, Blackstone, and KKR.
